title: ChatGPT
html:
ChatGPT is the spine running down the middle of the corpus — Yahir starts brainstorming wedges weeks after the November 2022 public launch and keeps relating to it every year since. The first mention is 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream (titled for the jazz pianist, written within weeks of GPT's launch), and it's already a working list of product ideas: a customer-service app (which he flags as too obvious), an "Advanced talking Tom" voice persona that gives advice as Steve Jobs / Jesus / Jay-Z, a dream app (mentioned twice — "describe your dream, ChatGPT makes it concise, image/video produced"). The same note carries the line "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have" — a thesis that becomes Rankett three years later.

By May 2024 (2024 05 13 things) Yahir treats a single OpenAI announcement as a fork in his career path: "OpenAI announcement — This is appearing to be a monumental moment that may decide the future of what I do, idk??" — most likely the GPT-4o demo with voice mode. He flags it, then immediately goes back to his ALGOS midterm. By late 2024 (2024 12 21 todos) ChatGPT (via the OpenAI API) is a stack component for BroMenu / Brotein: GPT runs the anabolic scoring of menu items, OpenAI's Camera API does OCR on physical menus, and cost-conscious caching is baked into the spec.

By 2026 the relationship inverts. In 2026 01 13 rankett com and the meetup prep GTM bible, ChatGPT is no longer a tool Yahir builds with — it's a channel he's optimizing brands for. Rankett's ai visibility engine tracks brand presence across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek, and Google AI Overviews. Yahir's tagline — "Prompts are the new keywords" — is the explicit positioning move: ChatGPT is the new search engine, so brands need a new SEO. The 2022 throwaway "asking the right question" line and the 2026 commercial thesis are the same idea, three years compounded.

Source summaries

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — first wedge brainstorming, weeks after launch
  • 2024 05 13 things — the OpenAI-announcement-as-fork moment
  • 2024 12 21 todos — ChatGPT/GPT API as the BroMenu scoring engine
  • 2026 01 13 rankett com — ChatGPT as channel, not tool
  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide — Rankett's GTM around AI visibility
  • first batch 2026 04 26 — meta-tracking the arc

Connections

  • openai api — the API layer Yahir actually integrates against
  • rankett / ai search optimization / ai visibility engine — current category
  • brotein / bromenu / anabolic scoring — earlier consumer
  • anthropic claude / gemini / perplexity / grok / deepseek / google ai overviews — sibling answer engines
  • asking the right question — the precursor thesis
  • dream app — early wedge idea
